# MessageComposeResult.failed

**Case**

The user’s attempt to save or send the message was unsuccessful.

## Declaration

```swift
case failed
```

## Constants

- **MessageComposeResult.cancelled**: The user canceled the composition.
- **MessageComposeResult.sent**: The user successfully queued or sent the message.

items.description: The user successfully queued or sent the message.
items.name: MessageComposeResult.sent
